description_long: This is a full-size RGB backlit keyboard set on a large rectangular mouse pad, accompanied by a wired mouse. The keyboard features a standard key layout with a numeric keypad and is illuminated with multicolored LED lighting, creating a vibrant and modern appearance. The mouse pad is bordered with a subtle light strip, complementing the keyboard's illumination. Three visible cables extend from the keyboard and mouse, indicating a wired connection for both devices. The surface of the keyboard and mouse pad appears to be made of hard plastic with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. This setup is typical for gaming or office environments and is designed for desktop use.
description: A full-size RGB backlit keyboard with a numeric keypad, paired with a wired mouse on a large illuminated mouse pad. The set features multicolored lighting and a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the keyboard, mouse, and mouse pad with all three cables extending outward and the RGB lighting clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the keyboard and mouse pad, with cables extending to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the keyboard and mouse, with cables emerging from the top and the RGB lighting strip around the mouse pad.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mouse and keyboard from the right, with cables trailing to the right and the illuminated border visible.
